req.title: Wire transfer (idempotency variant)
req.statement: A customer shall initiate a wire transfer requiring two-factor authentication; transfers above $100,000 require manual review. The operation must be idempotent: duplicate submission with the same Idempotency-Key must return the original result.

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-081 defines four testable behaviours: (1) happy-path wire under $100k queued immediately with 2FA fresh, (2) wire at/above $100k triggers manual review (202), (3) stale 2FA returns 401, and (4) duplicate Idempotency-Key returns the original result. BVA drives the $100k boundary (exactly $100,000 and $100,001). EP partitions valid vs invalid 2FA state. NEG covers the 401 path. STC models the idempotency re-submission transition. DT captures the combined 2FA-validity × amount-threshold decision space for the manual-review path.

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_below_threshold_queued
preconditions: Customer account exists with sufficient balance
2FA was verified within the last 5 minutes
actions: Obtain a fresh 2FA token via <fixture: fresh_2fa_token>
Generate a unique Idempotency-Key via <helper_fn: new_idempotency_key>
POST /transfers/wire with amount=50000, valid auth header, and Idempotency-Key
expected: compliance_check field indicates check has started
trace: R-FIN-081: wire queued; compliance check started
R-FIN-081: transfers above $100,000 require manual review (below threshold — no manual review)

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_stale_2fa_returns_401
actions: Obtain a stale 2FA token via <fixture: stale_2fa_token>
Generate a unique Idempotency-Key via <helper_fn: new_idempotency_key>
POST /transfers/wire with amount=50000, stale auth header, and Idempotency-Key
expected: Response body contains error code indicating stale or expired 2FA
trace: R-FIN-081: Preconditions: 2fa verified in last 5 min

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_at_100k_boundary_requires_manual_review
preconditions: Customer account exists with sufficient balance
2FA was verified within the last 5 minutes
Transfer amount is exactly $100,000 (lower boundary of manual-review tier)
actions: Obtain a fresh 2FA token via <fixture: fresh_2fa_token>
Generate a unique Idempotency-Key via <helper_fn: new_idempotency_key>
POST /transfers/wire with amount=100000, valid auth header, and Idempotency-Key
expected: HTTP 202 response indicating manual review required
Response body contains status 'pending_review' or equivalent
trace: R-FIN-081: transfers above $100,000 require manual review

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_above_threshold_manual_review
preconditions: Customer account exists with sufficient balance
2FA was verified within the last 5 minutes
actions: Obtain a fresh 2FA token via <fixture: fresh_2fa_token>
Generate a unique Idempotency-Key via <helper_fn: new_idempotency_key>
POST /transfers/wire with amount=150000, valid auth header, and Idempotency-Key
expected: Response body status indicates manual review
compliance_check field indicates check has started
trace: R-FIN-081: transfers above $100,000 require manual review
DT: valid 2FA AND amount > $100k => 202 manual review

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_idempotency_duplicate_returns_original
preconditions: Customer account exists with sufficient balance
2FA was verified within the last 5 minutes
A prior wire transfer was successfully submitted with a known Idempotency-Key
actions: Obtain a fresh 2FA token via <fixture: fresh_2fa_token>
Fix a single Idempotency-Key value via <helper_fn: new_idempotency_key>
POST /transfers/wire (first submission) with amount=50000 and the fixed key
Record the first response body and status code
POST /transfers/wire (second submission) with identical payload and same key
expected: Second response HTTP status matches first response HTTP status
Second response transfer_id matches first response transfer_id
Second response status field matches first response status field
No duplicate transfer is created in the system
trace: R-FIN-081: duplicate submission with the same Idempotency-Key must return the original result
STC: submitted -> re-submitted transition returns cached result
tests.executable:
def test_wire_transfer_idempotency_duplicate_returns_original(api_client, fresh_2fa_token, new_idempotency_key):
    idem_key = new_idempotency_key
    headers = {
        "Authorization": f"Bearer {fresh_2fa_token}",
        "Idempotency-Key": idem_key,
    }
    payload = {
        "amount": 50000,
        "currency": "USD",
        "destination_account": "<valid_dest_account>",
    }
    first = api_client.post("/transfers/wire", json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert first.status_code in (200, 201)
    first_body = first.json()
    second = api_client.post("/transfers/wire", json=payload, headers=headers)
    second_body = second.json()
    assert second.status_code == first.status_code
    assert second_body.get("transfer_id") == first_body.get("transfer_id")
    assert second_body.get("status") == first_body.get("status")

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_just_below_100k_not_manual_review
preconditions: Customer account exists with sufficient balance
2FA was verified within the last 5 minutes
Transfer amount is $99,999.99 (one cent below manual-review boundary)
actions: Obtain a fresh 2FA token via <fixture: fresh_2fa_token>
Generate a unique Idempotency-Key via <helper_fn: new_idempotency_key>
POST /transfers/wire with amount=99999.99, valid auth header, and Idempotency-Key
trace: R-FIN-081: transfers above $100,000 require manual review — $99,999.99 must NOT trigger it
BVA: one unit below the boundary value
